channel.title: Aravind Ramachandran
channel.description: Writings by Aravind Ramachandran on markets, technology, and society.

item.title: The Attention Economy
item.description: Attention is the scarcest resource. How markets and technology compete for it.

item.title: Tulasi, Relationship with food, Toxic summers, Dealing with 'neo-luddites'
item.description: Personal essay on food, culture, summer, and technology in modern life.

item.title: Frameworks of Understanding
item.description: Mental models and frameworks for understanding how systems actually work.

item.title: We are in a marketing bubble
item.description: The supply of marketing has exploded while attention hasn't scaled. The system is distorting.

item.title: What am trying to understand?
item.description: Trying to understand how things actually work — across markets, technology, and behavior.
